title: Back to the Past
description: A resource pack that brings the atmosphere of the old Minecraft.
body:
## Disclaimer
I don't speak English, so the entire text was translated through a translator. If there are any oddities in the text, I apologize in advance.


## Description
This resource pack represents my vision of what nostalgia might look like. Initially, the project was a revision of [Beta Continuum](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/beta-continuum/?ysclid=mcf13ie6pk795081593), but in the end I decided to rework it into a separate resource pack. His goal is not an ordinary downgrade, but a detailed rethinking of all textures. This is far from the release version of the resource pack. So far, this is only a public alpha test. I would be very grateful to hear your suggestions and comments about the resource pack. I took some of the textures from various mods and other resource packs. In the future, I will try to change them all to my own.


## Compatibility
My goal for recycling is not only vanilla minecraft, but also mods. Here is a list of mods that are currently supported by the resource pack in one way or another:
- Create
- Farmer's Delight
- Guard Villagers
